shadows.name: tactile-lift
shadows.purpose: Active focus states and card hovers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action button with tactile press feedback.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #D4A843; color: #0A0A0E; padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; border-radius: 12px; border: none; letter-spacing: 0.3px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 250ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E0BC5E; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(212, 168, 67, 0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97) translateY(0); }

components.name: Luxury Product Card
components.description: Premium display card with integrated status and hidden overflow image animations.
components.html:
Pottery

Handmade Clay Vase

550.00 EGP
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #EAE6DF; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: all 250ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1); } .ds-card-img-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 4/3; } .ds-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 400ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .ds-card:hover .ds-card-img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card:active { transform: scale(0.98) translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-badge { position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); color: #fff; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 18px; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #141416; } .ds-card-price { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #B8912A; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: Curio represents the digital home of authentic Egyptian artisanry. Its aesthetic architecture is built on the intersection of ancient heritage (conveyed through warm golds, serif display types, and organic paper tones) and modern, high-end digital tooling.

rules.name: The Gold Rarity Rule
rules.body: Gold is used on less than 10% of any given screen area. Its premium feel depends entirely on its scarcity.

rules.name: The Dual-Language Height Rule
rules.body: When Arabic typography (Cairo) is active, line-height increments by 15% to prevent diacritics clipping.

rules.name: The Active Spring Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements scale down by 3% (scale(0.97)) on press, providing a physical, springy click sensation.

dos: Do maintain generous white space between grid items (minimum 24px spacing).
Do use native scale transforms on hover to raise cards rather than introducing hard borders.
Do pair Playfair Display headings with Inter body text.
donts: Don't use solid 1px black lines to wrap inner details.
Don't use neon colors or bright saturated gradients for actions.
Don't apply un-gated image scaling (scale the image container border instead).
